name: Scrape and store data from multiple website pages
description: Scrapes multiple URLs with Firecrawl in a loop, uses Claude AI to compile and analyze the extracted data, and posts a structured summary to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Scrape and store data from multiple website pages

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

urls.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to scrape (e.g. 'https://example.com/page1,https://example.com/page2')

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the scraping summary

extractionGoal.default: Extract all structured data, key facts, and notable information
extractionGoal.description: What kind of data to extract from the pages

steps.name: Compile scraped content from all pages
Build Claude prompt for multi-page analysis
Run Claude AI analysis on multi-page data
Build Slack Block Kit summary message
